title: Deliciously Crispy Ethiopian Lentils Misir Wot
description: A bitter, crispy, and comforting Ethiopian dish featuring fajita seasoning, this vegetarian-friendly Misir Wot is served in a Korean brass bowl.
instructions: In a large pot, heat the oil over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Add the fajita seasoning, berbere spice, salt, and black pepper, and stir for 1 minute.
Add the rinsed lentils and water to the pot, and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes, or until the lentils are tender.
Use a whisk to mash some of the lentils and create a thicker consistency.
Increase the heat to medium-high and cook for an additional 5 minutes, or until the lentils are crispy.
Serve the Misir Wot hot in a Korean brass bowl.
